title: Preview — media quick-look
description: OS quick-look viewer. Zoomable images with dimensions + checkerboard transparency, an audio player with CSS-bar waveform/transport, a video player with play/pause + scrubber + volume, and PDF/text surfaces. Type-indicator chip, Download, and Open-in-editor handoff (image→media-studio, video/audio→reel-editor; remote files→code-editor). Opened from the launcher; switch samples with prev/next. Fully offline — no external network.
